ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation – Flight 1234
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Please find below the details of your upcoming flight:

• **Flight**: SH1234
• **Departure**: New York (JFK) – 08:15 AM, 22 May 2026
• **Arrival**: Los Angeles (LAX) – 11:45 AM, 22 May 2026
• **Seat**: 12B (Aisle)
• **Gate**: 18
• **Check‑in**: 07:15 AM, 22 May 2026
• **Baggage**: 1 carry‑on (max 7 kg) + 1 checked bag (max 23 kg)

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For any changes to your booking, use the link below:
<URL>

We look forward to welcoming you aboard.

Best regards,

SkyHigh Airlines Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Application Approval Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! Your application for the 2026 Global Scholars Program has been shortlisted by the Office of the Dean at Prestigious University. You have been selected for a full scholarship worth $10,000, covering tuition, housing, and a stipend.

To finalize your award, we require immediate verification of your personal details. Failure to respond within 48 hours may result in your award being revoked.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Dr. Alan Thompson
Dean, Office of Student Affairs
Prestigious University
